title: Dirge
description:
[gold]Summon[/gold] 3 X times.
Add X [gold]Souls[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
upgraded_description:
[gold]Summon[/gold] 4 X times.
Add X [gold]Souls+[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
notes: Creates Soul cards for each X energy spent. Each Soul is upgraded if the card is upgraded.
